name: S2 Resources Ltd
summary: S2 Resources Ltd engages in the exploration of various mineral properties. It explores for copper, gold, nickel, and platinum metals. The company holds interest in the Norcott project covering an area of 256 square kilometres; and the Polar Bear Nickel project that covers 510 square kilometres located in Australia. It has properties in Finland, Sweden, and the United States. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Osborne Park, Australia.
